title: Evernight Dance
description: Evernight is everywhere. Evernight takes over the world. Honkai: Star Rail
body: # Evernight Dance This resource pack will cover every block in Minecraft with Evernight Dance. Evernight is everywhere. Evernight takes over the world. ## Showcase > ## Videos > > > ## Environments > ![Environment 01](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d52d8abddf05ac7475ad0abaa5f4b55265b133a.jpeg) > ## The sun will be replaced with March7th. > ![March7th Sun](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea3140e15cb23d2cbcb764b9b8262531d19a989f_0.webp) > ## The moon will be Evernight. > ![Evernight Moon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/479e1ede8c9a087266314a745f4fab9123ac296b_0.webp) ## Credit Animations: - [千层的小星](https://space.bilibili.com/104349118) - [是郁哥吖](https://space.bilibili.com/335088709) Texture Processing - [EarthlyEric6](https://www.youtube.com/@earthlyeric6) ### Place a Evernight here.
